positive: A minimalist, highly detailed illustration of a stylized golden celestial fox spirit (Kumiho), standing gracefully amidst swirling geometric constellations and subtle bioluminescent flora. The fox is depicted with a majestic, clean silhouette and vibrant, flowing fur rendered in shades of gold, burnt orange, and sapphire blue. The background should feature abstract, deep space patterns using negative space principles and strong contrast. High contrast, woodcut print style mixed with neon glow accents. Centered composition, suitable for apparel printing, vector art aesthetic, UHD, high resolution, graphic novel style, cinematic lighting, symmetrical.
